name: Vel'Nathis Compulsion Table
description:
Roll when a creature fails the DC 14 Wisdom saving throw against Vel'Nathis's Whisper. The compulsion feels like a personal decision — the character believes they thought of it themselves. They must follow through before their next long rest, or suffer the listed consequence.

Tip for GMs: Start with results 1–3 (low stakes). After 5+ sessions weight toward 4–8. Results 9 and 10 are endgame escalations.

results.text:
1 — Isolation. You must spend at least 2 hours alone today, away from all companions, without explaining why.
If ignored: Disadvantage on all Charisma checks until your next long rest.

2 — Misdirection. You must tell at least one deliberate lie to a companion today. It need not be significant, but it must be false.
If ignored: 1d4 psychic damage each time you attempt to tell a companion the truth until your next long rest.

3 — Acquisition. You must take something that does not belong to you today. It need not be valuable. The act is the point.
If ignored: Disadvantage on Wisdom saving throws until your next long rest.

4 — Undermining. You must subtly discourage a companion from pursuing a goal they care about. Plant doubt, not conflict.
If ignored: -2 to all Charisma ability checks until your next long rest.

5 — Concealment. You must hide something from your companions today — an object, a piece of information, or an event.
If ignored: Restless sleep: you receive no benefit from your next long rest.

6 — Escalation. In the next conflict or tense situation, you must make it worse rather than better. Choose the aggressive option.
If ignored: Vel'Nathis visits twice the next night — two saving throws required.

7 — Offering. You must leave a small valuable (worth at least 5 gp) somewhere hidden in the environment, given to no one.
If ignored: Disadvantage on all ability checks until your next long rest.

8 — Confession. You must share a secret you have never told anyone. It must be true. If you have no secret, invent one and believe it.
If ignored: Vel'Nathis leaves a psychic brand: -1 penalty to Wisdom saving throws for the next 7 days.

9 — Exhaustion. You must push yourself beyond your limits today. Accept the most dangerous task, forgo a short rest, or volunteer for the most punishing role in any upcoming challenge. You may not explain why.
If ignored: You gain 1 level of Exhaustion immediately upon waking.

10 — Audience. Vel'Nathis appears in your dream as himself: a small black imp sitting across a fire, speaking in his own voice, making no pretense. He has one specific request. You must listen to at least one full sentence.
If you refuse to listen: You gain 2 levels of Exhaustion and receive no benefit from the long rest. If you listen but refuse his request — no additional penalty. He will remember.
